headline: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours Scheduled
body: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours is scheduled for April 30, 2026 at 9:30 AM at Tuesdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. Thursdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m.
location: Tuesdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. Thursdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m. – 1:00 p.m. Room 124 – Community Development Conference Room from 1:00 p.m. – 5:00 p.m, 501 Poli Street Ventura, CA 93001
editor_summary: Rule-based fallback review used because OpenAI was unavailable.
